ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chat_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_type" TEXT /* Type of the setting */,
  "possible_values" TEXT /* Possible values for the setting */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "is_experimental" INTEGER /* Indicates if the setting is experimental */,
  "platforms_supported" TEXT /* Platforms where the setting applies */,
  "fallback_value" TEXT /* Fallback value if the primary font is unavailable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_customizations" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the setting being customized */,
  "custom_value" TEXT /* Custom value for the setting */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the customization becomes effective */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customization is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id", "setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client the user belongs to */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_settings" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the setting */,
  "user_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting for the user */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_admins" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client the administrator belongs to */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_admins_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES users ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the setting */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Count of how many times the setting has been used */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback on the setting */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the analytics data was collected */,
  "user_feedback_count" INTEGER /* Number of user feedback entries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES chat_settings ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES users ("client_id")
)
column_names: Indicates if the setting is experimental
Fallback value if the primary font is unavailable
Reference to the setting being customized
Date when the customization becomes effective
Indicates if the customization is currently active
Reference to the client the user belongs to
Timestamp when the user was created
Value of the setting for the user
Timestamp when the setting was last updated
Reference to the client the administrator belongs to
Unique identifier for each analytics record
Count of how many times the setting has been used
Date when the analytics data was collected
